overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving a futuristic convertible through Night City's downtown district. The drive transitions from open neon-lit streets through covered underpasses and commercial areas with massive digital billboards, showcasing the game's cyberpunk aesthetic with heavy neon lighting and modern architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with neon signage

events.description: approaching first intersection with crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: driving a futuristic convertible through downtown streets, navigating between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving in parallel lane

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'Night City' mounted on building facade
tall modern glass building with reflective windows towering over street
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying commercial content
elevated highway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide multi-lane city street in Night City, with the player driving a futuristic convertible. Neon signs including a prominent 'Night City' sign illuminate the left side, while glass skyscrapers rise in the distance. The car approaches an intersection with crosswalk markings, sharing the road with moderate traffic including other futuristic vehicles.

events.description: entering covered tunnel under the overpass, sky becomes obscured
ambient light shifts from mixed neon to artificial fluorescent overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the covered underpass section with artificial lighting

entered.detail: concrete ceiling of the covered underpass with embedded fluorescent fixtures
thick support pillar for the overpass structure
linear fluorescent light fixtures mounted on tunnel ceiling providing illumination

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass beneath the highway overpass, transitioning from the open street to an enclosed concrete corridor. The natural and neon lighting gives way to harsh fluorescent overhead lights. Concrete pillars line the sides of the road as the car continues through the tunnel-like structure.

events.description: exiting the covered underpass back into open air and natural ambient light
making a right turn at the intersection to follow the road

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel and navigating a right turn at the intersection, following traffic flow

notable_agents.action: white sedan ahead slowing for the turn

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
tall palm tree on sidewalk adding greenery to urban environment
traffic signal showing green light above the intersection

segments.scene_description: The car emerges from the underpass into an open intersection, transitioning back to mixed lighting with visible sky. The player navigates a right turn at the crosswalk, following a white sedan through the intersection. Palm trees and modern buildings line the streets as the vehicle continues into the next district.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with massive digital billboards

events.description: entering dense commercial area with large holographic advertisements and billboards

agents.ego_description: cruising through the commercial district surrounded by towering digital advertisements and neon signage

entered.detail: massive digital billboard displaying Levi's advertisement with prominent red neon lettering
building-mounted screen showing animated commercial content
very tall modern tower with illuminated windows rising above the street
raised multi-lane highway structure running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense commercial canyon dominated by massive digital billboards including a prominent Levi's advertisement. Towering skyscrapers with glass facades line both sides of the street, while an elevated highway runs overhead. The scene is bathed in colorful neon light from the surrounding advertisements.

events.description: entering complex highway interchange area with multiple overpass levels
navigating through moderate traffic under the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: driving under multiple concrete overpasses and navigating through the highway interchange

notable_agents.action: blue sports car overtaking on the left side

entered.detail: complex multi-level highway junction with merging ramps and overpasses
curved elevated roadway entrance merging into the main highway
ground floor commercial establishment with illuminated glass front

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the car driving through a complex highway interchange with multiple levels of concrete overpasses blocking most of the sky. The vehicle passes under the elevated highway structure while navigating moderate traffic, including a blue sports car overtaking on the left. Street-level shops line the right side as the drive continues through the urban infrastructure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic metropolis, transitioning from open neon-lit boulevards into enclosed concrete underpasses and dense commercial canyons. It begins on a wide multi-lane street illuminated by prominent Night City signs and glass skyscrapers before the vehicle descends into a covered underpass, where the open sky is replaced by harsh fluorescent overhead lights and concrete pillars. As the car emerges from the tunnel and navigates a right turn through a sunlit intersection lined with palm trees, the environment shifts into a towering commercial district dominated by massive digital billboards and colorful neon advertisements. The scene then expands into a complex highway interchange, moving beneath multiple levels of concrete overpasses that block the sky. Finally, the camera follows the car through moderate traffic and past street-level shops as it weaves through the heavy urban infrastructure.
